authority_scope.scope: synthetic evidence packets with recency and completeness gates

propositions.statement: Reject unreadable packets before substantive review and record the failed readability check.
Classify readable packets as current only when their recorded age is no more than 30 days.
Route packets missing a required attachment to hold even when their age is current.

contradictions.resolution: Current age does not override the attachment-completeness hold.

failure_signatures.signature: unreadable packet receives a substantive disposition

claim_boundary: Internal interface calibration only; no expert or professional authority.
